free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of vector polarized
deuterons from even samarium isotopes at 56 MeV
Beam intensity is less than 70 nA.
Solid angle of detector is 1.6, 2.4 msr.(forward
ANG-CM is polar angle (c.m.) between beam and deuteron
